strategy_summary: Nests of Australian scrub-birds are lined with masticated wet plant material that dries into a cardboard substance. “The Australian scrub-birds ( Atrichornis ) line their nests with masticated wet plant material which dries into a substance resembling cardboard.” (Pallasmaa 1995:20)
mechanism:
Nests of Australian scrub-birds are lined with masticated wet plant material that dries into a cardboard substance.

“The Australian scrub-birds ( Atrichornis ) line their nests with masticated wet plant material which dries into a substance resembling cardboard.” (Pallasmaa 1995:20)
